name: dag
description: wtp128pro's personal Claude Code skills marketplace.

plugins.name: dag
plugins.description: Gated, multi-phase task execution with FORMALLY-ENFORCED invariants (JSON Schemas + finite-state-machine spec + a runnable validator, plus a formal-model layer — TLA+ machine-checked with TLC, Alloy machine-checked with Kodkod/SAT4J): a universal Socratic move-set referenced by every prompt, applied selectively, clarification, contextual cartography, atomic work-unit DAG, budget-capped subagent executors with propose/critique personas, independent adversarial verification (default distinct-lens panel-of-3 on high-stakes units, coverage-first, loop-until-dry), formalized bounded self-learning loops, bounded mid-run graph amendments (fuel-budgeted append-only work-graph growth, machine-checked quiescence), adaptive anti-hallucination evidence standards, large-dataset map-reduce partitioning, and a durable plan/decision/progress/learnings ledger.
